Phase 1 Grant Scope
PHASE 1 — GRANT SCOPE

Warm Up — Lucky Spin

A focused, mobile-native MVP built around one core mechanic: the Lucky Spin. Users earn raffle tickets daily — accumulating toward the Inaugural Grand Draw. Simple, addictive, viral by design.

🎯

Community First

Build a large, engaged audience before the full platform launches. The Warm Up community becomes RaffleCity's first users — already invested in the product through accumulated tickets.

💎

Founder Club NFT Sale

The 5,000 Founder Club NFTs (Bronze / Silver / Gold) sell during Warm Up. Lucky Spin players have a direct financial incentive — their NFT multiplies all accumulated tickets for the Inaugural Grand Draw.

🚀

Inaugural Grand Draw

All Warm Up tickets convert to entries for the Inaugural Draw: 1 BTC + Tesla Model 3 equivalent + Round-the-World Business Class Trip.

📱

Solana dApp Store

Built mobile-first for Seeker devices. Full MWA + Seed Vault integration, SKR compatibility, and dApp Store as primary distribution channel — direct access to 100,000+ active Seeker users.

CORE DAILY LOOP

6-Step Engagement Mechanic

1
Open the app
2
Tap to spin — 1 free spin/day
3
Win raffle tickets (variable reward)
4
Complete social missions for bonus spins
5
Refer a friend — both earn bonus tickets
6
Push notifications — bonus spin events & jackpot countdowns
⚡ SOLANA MOBILE NATIVE
TOKEN MODEL

RFLE + SKR Dual-Token Structure

RFLE is and remains the platform's primary native token. SKR is integrated as a complementary token, exclusively for the Seeker ecosystem — running in parallel, enhancing the experience for Seeker users without replacing RFLE.

RFLE — Primary Platform Token

  • Powers all raffle entries globally
  • 100% burn on every play — deflationary flywheel
  • Required across all verticals and devices
  • Buy with SOL, USDC or USDT — price indexed in USD
  • Win via Warm Up, quests — trade on secondary markets

SKR — Seeker Companion Token

  • Entry option for Lucky Spin boosts on Seeker
  • Unlocks additional daily spins for Seeker users
  • Access to exclusive SKR-only raffles at platform launch
  • Bonus ticket multipliers when staking SKR
  • Runs in parallel — does not replace RFLE
GRANT UTILIZATION

How $10,000 Is Allocated

Grant funding covers Phase 1 exclusively — the Warm Up MVP. The requested amount ($10,000 – $20,000) is tied entirely to specific deliverables. No token distribution, no prize funding, no unrelated marketing.

40%
Mobile App Development
UI/UX, spin engine, tickets, push notifications
20%
Smart Contracts
On-chain tickets, VRF spin outcome, auto settlement
20%
SKR Integration
SKR flows, MWA + Seed Vault, Seeker-exclusive access
10%
Testing & Deployment
QA, security audit, dApp Store submission
10%
Legal & Compliance
Raffle legality by jurisdiction, KYC/AML, GDPR
DEVELOPMENT ROADMAP

4 Milestones · 3 Months

Grant funding covers Phase 1 only. Phase 2 is funded by Founder Club NFT revenue + VC investment + future Solana grants. Phase 3 is self-funded through platform revenue.

P1 · MONTH 1

Lucky Spin Core

Spin wheel UI/UX, daily mechanic, variable reward engine, ticket accumulation, wallet-abstracted login (email/Google/Apple), MWA integration

P2 · MONTH 2

Blockchain Integration

On-chain ticket minting, VRF-based spin outcome verification, automated ticket settlement, Seed Vault integration for Seeker

P3 · MONTH 3

SKR + Social Layer

SKR entry options, Seeker-exclusive bonus spins, referral engine, social missions (follow/share/invite), push notification system

P4 · MONTH 3

Testing & Launch

QA, performance optimization, security audit, dApp Store submission and launch on Seeker

TARGET METRICS · 3–6 MONTHS POST-LAUNCH

Conservative. Achievable. Verifiable.

Deliberately conservative targets based on comparable early-stage mobile engagement products. We prefer to under-promise and over-deliver.

5,000 – 15,000
App Installs
2,000 – 8,000
Registered Users
10 – 20%
Daily Active Users (DAU)
50k – 200k
Raffle Tickets Generated
15%+
SKR-Enabled Feature Usage
10 – 20%
Referral Participation Rate
PRODUCT DESIGN

UI Preview — Lucky Spin

This is a design preview of the Warm Up / Lucky Spin interface. The application is currently in development — this mockup illustrates the intended user experience and product vision that will be built with the grant funding.

🎡
Lucky Spin Wheel
Variable reward mechanic — tickets, RFLE, replays or jackpot hit
🏆
Live Jackpot
SOL jackpot built during Warm Up — added as extra prize to the Inaugural Raffle
🔥
Daily Check-In + Streak
Daily habit loop — come back every day, stack more entries, build streak
⭐
Rank System
Challenger → Elite progression — gamified engagement driving long-term retention
PRODUCT IN ACTION

What a RaffleCity Draw Looks Like

This is a UI mockup of a live raffle on RaffleCity — a Rolex Submariner, value $12,500. Transparent odds, guaranteed draw, one ticket to enter. This is the experience we are building. Design concept — not yet live.

Transparent Odds
Every participant sees their exact odds in real time — 1/8,186 here. No opacity, no hidden mechanics. Fully on-chain.
Guaranteed Draw
Draw triggers automatically at 15,000 tickets — no human intervention possible. Smart contract enforced.
One Ticket to Enter
Entry costs 1 raffle ticket — earned through Warm Up or purchased with RFLE. Accessible to everyone, anywhere.
Live Countdown
Real-time countdown, live ticket sales, progress bar — the urgency and excitement is built into every draw.
